description: An onboarding specialist needs to schedule a new hire for the bi-weekly new hire orientation session.

nodes.task_description: Identify all new hires starting in the next two weeks.

expected_outcome.expected: Specialist generates a list of upcoming new hires from the HRIS.

nodes.task_description: Enroll the new hires in the next available orientation session in the LMS.

expected_outcome.expected: Specialist successfully enrolls all new hires.

nodes.task_description: Send a calendar invitation and welcome packet to the new hires with the details of the orientation.
